name: Kangaroo (aka Vodkatini)
directions: Stir with ice and strain into a martini glass or over ice with the twist.

name: Australian Desert
directions: Blend banana liqueur, cointreau, and cream with ice and 1/2 a banana.
Float Bailey's.

name: Wattleseed Coffee
directions: brew coffee and wattleseed in a filter in coffee pot with 1 1/2 cups water.
mix in sugar, vanilla and cream.
pour into two large glasses and serve with grated chocolate on top.

name: Champagne Cocktail
directions: Place a sugar cube in the bottom of 6 champagne glasses. Add a few drops of the bitters to each cube of sugar.
Pour the wine ,evenly into the 6 glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Vanilla Ginger Sour Cocktail
directions: Pour ingredients into a serving glass & stir to combine.

name: Dragon Slayer Cocktail
directions: Mix together & serve over ice.

name: Pink Pomegranate Sparkler
directions: Serve all ingredients mixed together in a tall glass over ice.

name: My Blue Horizon (Cocktail)
directions: Combine all ingredients & serve over ice.

name: Vanilla Champagne
directions: Pour all ingredients into a glass & stir to combine.

name: Merry Mozart
directions: Combine all ingredients except ice cream, in a glass over ice.
Stir well and top with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
Garnish with nutmeg.

name: Snowball
directions: Shake and strain all ingredients in a mixing glass and pour over ice into a balloon glass.
Garnish with shaved chocolate.

name: Aussie Blazer
directions: Combine Grand Marnier with sugar and bitters in a balloon glass.
Dissolve sugar by stirring, then add the remaining ingredients and flame.

name: Martini With Bitters
directions: Stir and strain all ingredients in a mixing glass and pour into a chilled martini glass.

name: An Aussie Sol
directions: Shake all ingredients except port wine and pour into an ice-filled old fashioned glass.
Float port wine.

name: Picasso
directions: Muddle cucumber and passion fruit.
Add remaining ingredients then shake and double strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with half a passion fruit.

name: Spring Fling Cocktail
directions: Muddle all fruit & lychee syrup in a cocktail shaker then add all ingredients with ice.
Shake and fine strain in a chilled martini glass. Garnish with a thin wedge of apple.

name: Pineapple Sunrise
directions: Add crushed ice to your glass.
Then add tequila and pineapple juice. Stir lightly.
Add a splash of grenadine syrup and serve.

name: Pomegranate Delight
directions: Combine the vodka and pomegranate juice., mix well.
Pour the juice over crushed ice and top with the soda water.

name: Vanilla Fudge Latte
directions: Combine syrups & coffee in a large mug, top with steamed milk & serve.

name: Pomegranate Buzz
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker including the crushed ice or icecubes.
Shake well and serve.

name: Kiwi Berry Cocktail
directions: Blend with lots of ice, serve in hurricane glass.
Garnish: Strawberry and Kiwi slice.

name: Vanilla Breeze Cocktail
directions: Place ingredients in a shaker filled with ice and shake.
Strain into a highball glass with ice.

name: Gallstone Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients with a little ice and strain into a cocktail glass.
Sprinkle with nutmeg to serve.

name: Lychee-Tini Lychee Martini
directions: Add to a shaker and mix with ice.
Pour into martini glasses and garnish with a slice of lime or a seeded fresh lychee.

name: Forbidden Fruit Cocktail
directions: Add plenty of ice to tall glasses.
Measure lychee liquor and juice over the ice and stir to blend.

name: Paraiso Rose (Lychee Liquor Cocktail)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a shaker. Shake and strain.
Serve in Martini glass.

name: Lychee Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a shaker and shake with crushed ice.
Pour into glasses and garnish with a slice of citrus (orange, lemon, lime).

name: Butterscotch Bombshell
directions: Shake vigorously with ice. Strain into chilled martini glass. Garnish with butterscotch biscuit.

name: Coco Pop Cocktail
directions: Pour Cola in a glass, blend rest.  Pour over coke in large cocktail glass.
Garnish with chocolate coated strawberry.

name: Kahlua Cake Cocktail
directions: Stir Kahlua & coke. Blend rest, serve in martini glass.
Float Kahlua & coke on top. Garnish with chocolate sprinkles.

name: Passionate Scene Cocktail
directions: Pour strawberry liqueur into a highball glass and add a scoop of ice.
Add orange & lemon juice and then lemonade, top with passionfruit but do not stir.

name: Red Wine Cooler
directions: Build ingredients over ice and top with soda.

name: Golden Gaytime Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker & shake well.
Strain into a glass frosted with crushed sweet biscuits or nuts.

name: Aida's Curse Cocktail
directions: Build all ingredients except banana liqueur.
Slowly pour banana liqueur down the side of the galss so it settles at the bottom.

name: Masquerade Cocktail
directions: Half fill a cocktail shaker full of ice, add the vodka, schnapps & juices.
Shake vigorously & strain into a chilled martini glass.

name: Malted Nightcap
directions: Combine malt powder & milk in a saucepan, heat until warm, add liqueur & pour into a mug.
Top with whipped cream to serve.

name: Rocky Road Cocktail
directions: Build all ingredients in a glass lined with chocolate & strawberry toppings.
Garnish with a fresh strawberry & a marshmallow.

name: Hot Mocha With Irish Cream
directions: Combine Creamy Evaporated Milk and water in a 250mL mug. For 1200 watt microwave oven, microwave on HIGH (100% power) for 30 seconds.
Stir in remaining ingredients and microwave on HIGH (100% power) for a further 20 seconds until hot.
Stir and serve.

name: Fatal Attraction Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker and strain into a glass.

name: Butterscotch Hot Chocolate
directions: Place the milk in a small saucepan over medium heat for 5 minutes or until it almost boils. Remove from heat.
Divide the chocolate among 2 tall heatproof glasses. Pour over the hot milk and butterscotch schnapps.
Top with marshmallows to serve.

name: Coco Lush Cocktail
directions: Blend ingredients with two scoops ice.
Creator recommends floating Grenadine & cream on top & Garnishing  with 1/2 strawberry & serving in a coconut rimmed glass.

name: Oklahoma Cooler
directions: Pour the watermelon, vodka and cranberry juice into a cocktail glass. Add the lemonade, and stir gently.
Garnish with a slice of lime and a maraschino cherry, and serve.

name: Vanilla Lips Cocktail
directions: Shake with ice and serve in Collins glass.
Garnish with cherry and orange slice.

name: Jt Delight Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients & serve over ice.

name: Foreign Affair Cocktail
directions: Shake & strain first 3 ingredients into a glass over ice. Top up with orange juice.

name: Chocolate Vanilla Tea
directions: Infused the tea in boiling water for 5 minutes.
Then add in chocolate powder and sweetened condensed milk. Stir and enjoy!
If you prefer a creamier or milkier version, then use normal milk instead of sweetened condensed milk.

name: Blue Cran-Apple Spritzer
directions: In a tall glass combine the Blueberry Wine & Cranberry Apple juice with some ice cubes.
Fill the glass with lemonade and stir the drink.
Garnish with lemon peel.

name: Caribbean Queen Cocktail
directions: Fill glass with handful of ice and add ingredients. Then mix.

name: Alpine Latte
directions: Combine Bailey's, Amaretto & Frangelico in a mug, add coffee & stir.
Garnish with cream & almonds.

name: Hot Musky Midnight
directions: Combine hot chocolate with liqueurs, top with whipped cream and decorate with pink sprinkles & a musk stick stirrer.

name: Spiced Cranberry Tea
directions: Place tea bags in a large heatproof jug. Pour over boiling water. Stir in sugar. Allow to brew for 5 minutes. Discard tea bags.
Add cranberry juice, cider and orange pieces to tea. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until cold.
Add vodka to tea. Stir to combine. Pour over ice. Serve.
Notes & tips.
For an alcohol-free version, replace vodka with 1/2 cup chilled apple cider.

name: Mocha Hot Chocolate
directions: In a small saucepan, whisk the milk, cocoa, coffee and sugar (or substitute) until combined.
Heat on medium, whisking occasionally for about 5 minutes or until it just comes to a simmer.
Remove pan from heat and stir in the Irish Cream or Coffee Liqueur.
Pour into glass mugs.
In a small saucepan, heat extra milk on low until warm.
Using a stick blender, blend until frothy or use coffee machine attachment if you have one.
Spoon froth over the drinks and serve.

name: Cougar Kickoff Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker, strain into a glass to serve.

name: Moon Crater Cocktail
directions: Put vodka & advokaat in a highball glass.
Fill with Fanta & top with cream.
Dust with nutmeg and serve with ice.

name: Sunset Cocktail
directions: Pour cherry brandy, advocaat & cream into a highball glass & top with lemonade.

name: Moomba Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients in a shaker & strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Nickel Fever Cocktail
directions: Half fill a cocktail shaker with ice and shake all ingredients until combined.
Strain into a glass and add a few extra drops of blue curacao.

name: Pablo Cocktail
directions: Combine ingredients in a cocktail shaker, shake & strain into a chapagne glass, garnish with a cherry to serve.

name: Miss Aileen Cocktail
directions: Shake  ingredients together with ice, strain into a small glass to serve.

name: Honeycomb Tango Cocktail
directions: Blend with ice to semi frappe,  place diced cherries in base of  hollow stem champagne glass.
Garnish with ice magic on top & two ends of wafer cone dripped in chocolate.

name: Ginger Punch
directions: Put ginger & lemon in the bottom of a warmed punch bowl.
Heat all remaining ingredients in a pan and pour over ginger & lemon.
Serve hot with grated nutmeg on top.
For extra bite add one or more of the optional ingredients.

name: Golden Glory Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients and strain over ice.

name: Paul Bassett's Espresso Martini
directions: Shake vodka, creme de cacao, espresso & syrup in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass & garnish with chocolate.

name: Creamy Mocha Cocktail
directions: Place the cream, amaretto, Baileys, Tia Maria and ice in the jug of a blender and blend until smooth. Pour evenly among serving glasses.
Posh serving tip:

Place the chocolate topping in a small plastic bag. Cut a small hole in 1 corner of the bag and drizzle the top of each drink with chocolate in a zigzag pattern. Drag a toothpick vertically through the zigzag pattern to create a slightly marbled effect, otherwise just line the glasses with it.
Serve immediately.

name: Jay Patey’s ‘designated Driver'
directions: Pour a shot of Elderflower Concentrate over Ice.
Top with Cranberry Juice.
Add a sprig of fresh mint.
Shake and then strain into tall glasses.

name: Lazy Limelon Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients over ice in a glass.

name: The Rose Cocktail
directions: Combine ice, apricot brandy, gin, vermouth & grenadine in a cocktail shaker, shake well.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: Aussie Beach Blond
directions: Combine the rum, Cointreau, lime juice, orange juice, sugar, and the juice from one passion-fruit in a blender with 1/4 cup of crushed ice.
Blend and add further crushed ice where needed until slushy consistency is achieved.
Pour into a hurricane glass, garnish with a slice of lemon, lime and orange, and serve.
Serve Aussie Beach Blond in a Hurricane Glass.

name: Flying Kangaroo
directions: Shake well over ice cubes in a shaker, and strain into a large highball glass with crushed ice. Add pineapple chunks, and serve.

name: Rowdy Cowboy
directions: Layer in shot glass. Salute!

name: Australian Virgin
directions: Shake and strain into an ice-filled highball glass, and serve with a cherry.

name: Harbour Tunnel
directions: Mix in a tumbler and enjoy!

name: New Zealand Sparkling Wine Cocktail
directions: Mix juice and Grand Marnier together.  Pour a little into 6 champagne flutes.
Fill glass with sparkling wine.
Enjoy!

name: Australian Mocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Add more ice for thicker consistency (if desired).
Garnish with sliced kiwi.

name: Absolut Wilhelm Tell
directions: Build over ice in tall glass, garnish with a slice of apple.

name: Absolut Madam
directions: Shake all ingredients with crushed ice and serve in a tall glass.

name: Ram Cocktail
directions: Shake & pour first 3 ingredients into a champagne glass, float whipped cream on top if desired.

name: A Genuine Nestle's Milo Clone!
directions: Mix the above ingredients thoroughly (preferably running them through a sieve).
Over a medium heat, stir this mixture into a saucepan with 1 U.S Cup of water (or milk - or a combination of the two! - as is your wont).
Allow it to simmer gently, but do not bring it to a full boil (as this will negatively affect the flavor profile).
After 5 to 10 minutes, turn the heat off, and adjust the sweetness by adding in an extra 1 to 2 tsps more of your favorite sweetener (Sugar, Xylitol, Dextrose, etc)!
And enjoy a drink of warm, comforting MILO; made by your own hand!
FURTHER NOTES:

The stated tsp measurements are actual proper measuring spoons; with each of the powders leveled out with precision. The Cup volume references a U.S Measuring Cup (i.e. 236ml). For any Aussies out there, 250ml is close enough, though. Malt Extract can be bought from any brewery store. Just make sure it is sourced from barley (not wheat), and that it is NON-diastatic! Also, make sure it is pure, with no additives whatsoever. Xylitol and/or dextrose can be subbed equally with the sugar (i.e. sub sweetener on a 1 to 1 basis). Finally, whilst the colour will be identical to the MILO we're all familiar with, the granulation will be completely different! MILO is made with a unique process that really can't be repeated at home, but fear not; for it's the taste that matters! Enjoy, my friends!

name: Lychee Champagne Cocktail
directions: Shake the first four ingredients together with some ice in a cocktail shaker.
Pour into a champagne flute, and top up with chilled champagne.

name: Cranberry and Orange Iced Tea
directions: Use a vegetable peeler to peel the rind from the orange. Use a small sharp knife to remove the white pith from the rind.
Place the rind and tea bags in a large heatproof jug. Pour over the water. Set aside for 20 minutes to infuse.
Remove the tea bags and rind, and discard. Add the cranberry juice and sugar to the jug, and stir to combine.

Cut half the orange flesh into small pieces and divide among 2 ice cube trays. Pour the tea mixture among the trays. Place in the freezer overnight. Cover the remaining tea mixture with plastic wrap and place in the fridge to chill.
Remove the ice cubes from the trays and place in a serving jug. Pour over the tea mixture and serve.

Time plan tip: Prepare this recipe to the end of step 4 up to 1 day ahead. Continue from step 5 just before serving. Picnic tip: Divide the ice cubes and tea among airtight bottles or jugs. Transport in your esky.

name: Melt Your Ice Cubes
directions: pour 1 cup of water into an ice tray.

place your filled tray in your home freezer for approximately 3 hours (freezing time may vary between different appliances and households). if you have trouble finding your home freezer, it will usually be attached to your home refrigerator, occupying the space above the refrigerating column. if this is not the case, i recommend that you purchase an ice chest or portable cooler.

once the water in your ice tray has fully completed and passed the freezing process, the "water" should have turned solid and have a white coating, if not, place the ice tray back in your home freezer for another hour. if your "water" does match the descriptions listed, proceed to the next step.
fill a boiling pot with 3 cups of water.
place the pot on your home stove (or any alternative boiling appliance or device, if you don't have a home stove).

if using a home stove, turn the corresponding dial to the highest heat or temperature setting. if using an alternative device/appliance, consult the user manual to find out how to access the heating option.
once the water begins to boil, turn off your device or appliance; then, you will place the ice cubes in your pot of boiled water.

once the ice cubes have fully "disappeared"(evaporated) in the boiled water, your project is complete! you may now do whatever you please with your finish. whether it may be to use in another recipe, or simply be discarded, it is your choice, so make the decision!

name: Aussie Beachcomber (Australian Mai Tai Cocktail)
directions: Precool a Low-Ball glass with ice.
Add all the ingredients into a cocktail shaker including the mint (mint must bruise with ice). Shake vigorously and pour into the Low-Ball glass over ice.
Serve with a cocktail spear of mulled pineapple or fresh pineapple chunks.

name: Australian Tropical Tea
directions: Bring orange juice to a boil in a saucepan. Remove from heat and add all other ingredients except lemon slices.
Cover and let steep 5 minutes or until desired strength.
Remove tea bags.
Allow to cool, then chill.
Strain and serve in small goblets, garnished with lemon slices.

name: Death by Hot Chocolate
directions: Place 1/3 cup of the cream in a saucepan and bring to a gentle simmer, remove from the heat and stir in chocolate until melted.
Then place two tablespoons of the chocolate mixture into 4 large glasses and swirl around the sides.
Dip the top of each marshmallow in the remaining mixture and place on a wire rack, refrigerate for 5 minutes or until set.
Add the remaining cream, milk and cinnamon stick to chocolate mixture and heat gently until just simmering. Whisk until frothy and pour into prepared chocolate coated glasses.
Sprinkle with ground cinnamon and chocolate shavings and serve with choc the chocolate dipped marshmallows.
